steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks for the text's main purpose. The word 'However' signals a limitation: the 2012 study used only about 14 fish, which could undermine its conclusion.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• "To present a debate between two research teams about a cause of ocean acidification.": The passage does not present two competing sides arguing against each other. ✗
  • "To discuss an aspect of ocean acidification that is frequently overlooked.": The passage does not suggest researchers missed something; it questions reliability due to sample size. ✗
  • "To note a potential concern about the findings of a scientific study.": The small sample of ~14 fish is cited as a reason the study's conclusion could be exaggerated or skewed. ✓
  • "To explain how the behavior of a fish species has changed over time.": No time-based behavioral shift is mentioned. ✗
That matches the correct answer — C is correct.
